allies.notes: Corsairs and Travelling Players; ANHRATHE also allowed
Ynnari/Eldritch Raiders; shared cap with HARLEQUINS
Harlequins are part of the Aeldari faction
Damned units from Codex: Chaos Space Marines; fixed 500 cap
Brood Brothers; GC must be WARLORD; excludes AIRCRAFT/COMMISSAR/EPIC HERO/MILITARUM TEMPESTUS/OGRYN/RATLING/TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER/MINISTORUM PRIEST; AM lose Voice of Command
Per Inquisitor + retinue pairing; no flat cap; forbidden by some detachments (Deathwatch)
Any IMPERIUM army via Inquisitor pairings
Chaos Daemons allied; match Mark of Chaos god
Chaos Daemons allied to Chaos Knights
Include one Chapter (BA/DA/SW/BT/DW/Ultramarines/Iron Hands/Salamanders/Imperial Fists/Raven Guard/White Scars), not others

faction_supers.name: Genestealer Cults
faction_supers.notes: can ally Astra Militarum Brood Brothers

core_stratagems.name: Command Re-roll
core_stratagems.description: WHEN: Any phase, just after you make an Advance, Charge, Hit, Wound, Damage, Save, Hazard or number-of-attacks roll for a friendly unit or model. TARGET: That unit or model. EFFECT: Re-roll that roll (if rolling several dice, re-roll one of them).

core_stratagems.name: Epic Challenge
core_stratagems.description: WHEN: Fight phase, just after a friendly CHARACTER unit is selected to fight. TARGET: That CHARACTER unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, one CHARACTER model in your unit has the [PRECISION] ability on its melee weapons.

core_stratagems.name: Insane Bravery
core_stratagems.description: WHEN: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just before you take a battle-shock test for a friendly unit. TARGET: That unit. EFFECT: That battle-shock test is automatically passed. RESTRICTIONS: Once per battle.

core_stratagems.name: Explosives
core_stratagems.description: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One friendly unengaged GRENADES unit that is eligible to shoot and did not Advance. EFFECT: Select an enemy unit within 8" of and visible to a model in your unit; roll six D6: for each 4+ that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

core_stratagems.name: Crushing Impact
core_stratagems.description: WHEN: Your Charge phase, just after a friendly MONSTER or VEHICLE unit ends a charge move. TARGET: That MONSTER or VEHICLE unit. EFFECT: Roll a number of D6 equal to its Toughness: for each 1 your unit suffers 1 mortal wound; for each 5+ an engaged enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (max 6).

core_stratagems.name: Rapid Ingress
core_stratagems.description: WHEN: End of your opponent's Movement phase. TARGET: One friendly unit in Strategic Reserves. EFFECT: Your unit makes an Ingress move. RESTRICTIONS: Not during the first battle round; cannot select an Aircraft.

core_stratagems.name: Fire Overwatch
core_stratagems.description: WHEN: Your opponent's Movement or Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 24". TARGET: One friendly unengaged unit. EFFECT: Your unit shoots using snap shooting — it may target only that enemy unit and hits only on unmodified 6s.

core_stratagems.name: Smokescreen
core_stratagems.description: WHEN: Start of your opponent's Shooting phase. TARGET: One friendly SMOKE unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, that unit (and units screened by it) has the benefit of cover.

core_stratagems.name: Heroic Intervention
core_stratagems.description: WHEN: End of your opponent's Charge phase. TARGET: One friendly unengaged unit within 12" of one or more enemy units. EFFECT: Resolve a charge with your unit (Leap to Defend, or Into the Fray for +1CP).

core_stratagems.name: Counteroffensive
core_stratagems.description: WHEN: Fight step of your opponent's Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks. TARGET: One friendly unit eligible to fight. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability and must be the next unit you select to fight.

tiers.text: You control more **objectives** than your opponent.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: For each **objective** you control.
For each of those **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**) if you control your **home objective**.
For each **objective** you control that you did not control at the start of the turn (excluding your **home objective**).

tiers.text: For each **objective** you control.
For each of those **objectives** that is within your opponent's territory.
You control one or more **central objectives**.
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
You control **three or more objectives**.

No enemy units are wholly within your territory.

A friendly unit performed a **sensor sweep** this turn (see reverse).

Only one of your opponent's **operation markers** is on the battlefield, if one or more of your units are within the same terrain area as that **operation marker**, and no enemy units are within that terrain area.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

For each of those **units** that is within range of one or more **objectives** in your opponent's territory.
